welcome.subtitle: AI Agent Workstation
welcome.description: Welcome to UseIt Studio. Take 30 seconds to learn the interface layout and get the most out of your AI Agent workflows.

leftPanel.title: Navigation & Panels
leftPanel.description: The icon bar on the left switches between features — Files, Search, Workflows, Skills, Environments, API Keys, and Remote Control. The panel beside it shows the corresponding content.

chatPanel.title: Command Center
chatPanel.description: Talk to your Agent in natural language. Select agents, issue task commands, and debug results — this is where you'll spend most of your time.

mainViewer.title: Main Canvas
mainViewer.description: The Agent's workspace. Watch Computer Use actions in real-time, or visually orchestrate your workflows here.

controlPanel.title: Environment & Config
controlPanel.description: Manage Agent runtime environments (Local PC / VM), configure workflow node parameters, and monitor task execution.

workTabs.title: Work Tabs
workTabs.description: Switch like browser tabs — open multiple workflows, VM screens, and file previews simultaneously.
